testcase.classname: Posts Routes GET /api/posts - returns empty array initially

testcase.classname: Posts Routes POST /api/posts - creates a post when logged in

testcase.classname: Posts Routes POST /api/posts - fails without auth
testcase.name: Posts Routes POST /api/posts - fails without auth

testcase.classname: Posts Routes POST /api/posts - fails without title
testcase.name: Posts Routes POST /api/posts - fails without title

testcase.classname: Posts Routes GET /api/posts/:id - returns a single post
testcase.name: Posts Routes GET /api/posts/:id - returns a single post

testcase.classname: Posts Routes GET /api/posts/:id - returns 404 for missing post
testcase.name: Posts Routes GET /api/posts/:id - returns 404 for missing post

testcase.classname: Posts Routes PUT /api/posts/:id - owner can update post
testcase.name: Posts Routes PUT /api/posts/:id - owner can update post

testcase.classname: Posts Routes DELETE /api/posts/:id - owner can delete post
testcase.name: Posts Routes DELETE /api/posts/:id - owner can delete post

testcase.classname: Posts Routes DELETE /api/posts/:id - non-owner cannot delete
testcase.name: Posts Routes DELETE /api/posts/:id - non-owner cannot delete

testcase.name: Auth Routes POST /api/auth/register - fails without username

testcase.name: Auth Routes POST /api/auth/register - fails with duplicate username

testcase.classname: Auth Routes POST /api/auth/login - returns token on valid credentials

testcase.classname: Auth Routes POST /api/auth/login - fails with wrong password
testcase.name: Auth Routes POST /api/auth/login - fails with wrong password
